title: Protocol to accompany paper entitled "Pharmacological characterization of crotamine effects on mice hind limb paralysis employing both ex vivo and in vivo assays: insights into the involvement of voltage-gated ion channels in the crotamine action on skelet
steps: Administer mouse infusions prior to placing them into the center of a open field arena (40 cm in diameter surrounded by 50 cm high walls, and with a bottom painted in white and designed as presented in the scheme below) in a brightly lit room.
Record the distance moved and time spent in the entire open field using the video tracking system and software, for 1 hour. 01:00:00
creator: Sunamita Lima
